embeds.menuFooter: Use the menu below · soft & simple
embeds.avatarHint: Your full-size avatar is shown below.

welcome.title: Welcome Aboard
welcome.description: {member} drifted into the server — say hi and pick your colors!

leave.title: See You Soon
leave.description: **{userTag}** left the reef. Catch you later!

colorMenu.title: Color Selection
colorMenu.description:
Pick a color from the menu below to tint your name.
A new pick replaces the old one · **Remove** clears it all.

genderMenu.title: Gender Selection
genderMenu.description:
Choose a role from the menu below.
One active pick at a time · **Remove** clears your choice.

roleMenu.title: Role Selection
roleMenu.description:
Tap the buttons below for ping roles you want.
Multiple picks allowed · tap again to drop a role.

interactions.genericCommandError: An error occurred while running this command.
interactions.genericComponentError: This action could not be completed. Make sure the bot's role is above the target role and that the role is configured with /setup.

startup.readyMessage: Bot is ready for commands and interactions.

ban.description: Ban a user from the server.

options.mesajSilGun: Delete the user's messages from the last X days (0-7)

ban.notBannable: ❌ I can't ban this user. Check the role hierarchy.

options.kullaniciId: ID of the user to unban

unban.notFound: ❌ No banned user was found with this ID.

kick.description: Kick a user from the server.
kick.notFound: ❌ This user was not found in the server.
kick.notKickable: ❌ I can't kick this user. Check the role hierarchy.

mute.description: Timeout a user for the specified duration.
mute.notFound: ❌ This user was not found in the server.
mute.notModeratable: ❌ I can't mute this user. Check the role hierarchy.

unmute.notFound: ❌ This user was not found in the server.
unmute.notMuted: ℹ️ This user is not muted.

clear.description: Bulk delete the last X messages in this channel.
clear.noneDeleted: ⚠️ No messages could be deleted (messages older than 14 days cannot be bulk deleted).

ayarla.description: Configure bot settings for this server. (Staff)

welcomeChannel.subcommandDescription: Set the channel for welcome messages.
welcomeChannel.success: ✅ Welcome messages will now be sent to {channel}.

leaveChannel.subcommandDescription: Set the channel for leave messages.
leaveChannel.success: ✅ Leave messages will now be sent to {channel}.

arrayErrors.duplicate: ⚠️ This role is already in the list.
arrayErrors.max: ⚠️ You can add up to {max} roles.

roleErrors.managed: ❌ Integration or bot-managed roles cannot be used.
roleErrors.hierarchy: ❌ Move the bot role above this role in Server Settings → Roles.

colorMenu.groupDescription: Configure color roles for the color selection menu.

add.subcommandDescription: Add a color role to the menu.
add.emojiOptionDescription: Emoji shown next to the option
add.success: ✅ Added {role} with color {hex}. Run `/color-menu` to post the menu.

remove.subcommandDescription: Remove a color role from the menu.
remove.notFound: ⚠️ That role is not in the color menu list.

genderMenu.groupDescription: Configure gender roles for the gender selection menu.

add.subcommandDescription: Add a gender role to the menu.
add.emojiOptionDescription: Emoji shown next to the option
add.success: ✅ Added {role}. Run `/gender-menu` to post the menu.

remove.subcommandDescription: Remove a gender role from the menu.
remove.notFound: ⚠️ That role is not in the gender menu list.

roleMenu.groupDescription: Configure interest/notification roles for the button menu.

add.subcommandDescription: Add a role to the button menu.
add.success: ✅ Added {role}. Run `/role-menu` to post the menu.

remove.subcommandDescription: Remove a role from the button menu.
remove.notFound: ⚠️ That role is not in the role menu list.

remove.subcommandDescription: Remove a rule by its number.

reset.subcommandDescription: Reset rules to the default template.

renkMenusu.description: Send the color selection menu to this channel. (Staff)
renkMenusu.missingRoleIds: ⚠️ No color roles configured yet. Add roles with `/setup color-menu add` first.
renkMenusu.success: ✅ Color menu sent and role colors synced.

cinsiyetMenusu.description: Send the gender selection menu to this channel. (Staff)
cinsiyetMenusu.missingRoleIds: ⚠️ No gender roles configured yet. Add roles with `/setup gender-menu add` first.

rolMenusu.description: Send the role selection menu to this channel. (Staff)
rolMenusu.missingRoleIds: ⚠️ No roles configured yet. Add roles with `/setup role-menu add` first.

options.kullanici: User to show info for (defaults to yourself)

avatar.description: Show a user's avatar in full size.

options.kullanici: User whose avatar to show (defaults to yourself)

language.success: Language set to **{language}**. Your next bot messages will use this language.

yardim.embedDescription: All bot commands are listed below.

join.description: Invite the bot to your current voice channel.
join.notInVoice: ❌ You need to join a voice channel first.
join.cannotJoin: ❌ I can't join this voice channel. Check my Connect permission.

leave.description: Disconnect the bot from its voice channel.
leave.notConnected: ℹ️ I'm not in a voice channel right now.

lofi.description: Play soft lofi music in your voice channel.
lofi.cannotJoin: ❌ I can't join this voice channel. Check my Connect permission.
lofi.success: 🎧 Now playing soft lofi in {channel}. Use `/music stop` or `/leave` to stop.
lofi.playbackError: ❌ Could not start lofi playback. Try again in a moment.

stop.subcommandDescription: Stop music and disconnect from voice.

volume.notPlaying: ℹ️ Nothing is playing right now.

nowPlaying.subcommandDescription: Check if lofi music is playing.
nowPlaying.playing: 🎧 Soft lofi is playing in a voice channel.
nowPlaying.notPlaying: ℹ️ No music is playing right now.
